items.title: Bonsai 27B: A 27B-Class model that runs on a phone
items.title_zh: Bonsai 27B：可在手机上运行的270亿参数模型
items.title_en: Bonsai 27B: 27B-Parameter Model Runs on a Phone
items.summary: Bonsai 27B is a 27B-parameter model quantized to fit on a phone, showcasing state-of-the-art compression with competitive performance.

items.title: The Tower Keeps Rising
items.title_zh: 阿明·罗纳赫论软件复杂度与AI
items.title_en: Armin Ronacher on Composability Challenges in AI Era
items.summary: Explores the growing complexity and composability challenges in software development, particularly in the context of AI and LLMs.

items.title: Cursor 0day: When Full Disclosure Becomes the Only Protection Left
items.title_zh: Cursor 零日漏洞：通过恶意 git.exe 执行任意代码
items.title_en: Cursor 0-Day: Arbitrary Code Execution via Malicious git.exe
items.summary: A 0-day vulnerability in Cursor allows arbitrary code execution via a malicious git.exe in the code directory, and the vendor has not fixed it for six months.

items.title: Punch yourself in the face with reality
items.title_en: The Reality Check on AI-Assisted Programming
items.summary: A cautionary essay on how using AI for programming can create an illusion of progress while actually leading to convoluted, unmanageable code.

items.title: Quoting Armin Ronacher
items.title_zh: 摩擦作为特性：软件项目中的共同理解
items.title_en: Friction as a Feature: Shared Understanding in Software Projects
items.summary: Armin Ronacher discusses how the shared language of software projects is maintained by friction, which may be lost with the rise of AI agents.

items.title: New LLM Coordination Benchmark - Benchmarking Open-Ended Multi-Agent Coordination in Language Agents [R]
items.title_zh: 新基准测试评估LLMs在开放式多智能体协调中的表现
items.title_en: New Benchmark Tests LLMs on Open-Ended Multi-Agent Coordination
items.summary: A new benchmark evaluates LLM agents on open-ended multi-agent coordination tasks, finding most perform poorly (~6% return) but Gemini 3.1 Pro matches specialized MARL agents on the hardest setting.

items.title: 2026 菲尔兹奖名单疑泄露：ICM 官网代码藏四位得主姓名
items.title_zh: 2026年菲尔兹奖得主疑从ICM官网代码泄露
items.title_en: 2026 Fields Medal winners leaked via ICM website code
items.summary: Potential leak of 2026 Fields Medal winners from ICM website code, sparking high community interest and betting markets.

items.title: Cloudflare 推出 Precursor，全程监控鼠标轨迹识别 AI 机器人
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 推出 Precursor：持续行为验证检测 AI 机器人
items.title_en: Cloudflare Precursor: Continuous Behavior Verification to Detect AI Bots
items.summary: Cloudflare introduces Precursor, a continuous behavior verification engine that tracks mouse movements and keyboard patterns to distinguish humans from bots throughout a session.

items.title: 🤖 DeepSeek 完成逾 500 亿元首轮融资，采用特殊架构维持创始人控制  据报道，DeepSeek 首轮融资筹得逾 500 亿元人民币（约 74 亿美元
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 首轮融资 5000 亿元，特殊架构保创始人控制权
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises $74B in First Round, Uses Special Structure to Keep Founder Control
items.summary: DeepSeek raised over 500 billion yuan ($74B) in first financing round using a special structure to maintain founder control, with personal investment from CEO and participation from Tencent and CATL.

items.title: 高德发布世界模型工坊，内置 "任意门" 可穿越 3D 世界
items.title_zh: 高德发布世界模型工坊，内置“任意门”功能
items.title_en: AutoNavi Launches World Model Workshop with 'Portal' Feature
items.summary: Alibaba's AutoNavi releases ABot-WorldStudio, a world model workshop that generates interactive 3D worlds from text or images with a 'space-time door' feature, running locally on RTX 5090 with unlimited inference time.

items.title: Telegram 短域名 t.me 突遭注册局冻结  Telegram 的短链接域名 t.me 已被注册局暂停使用。
items.title_en: Telegram short domain t.me frozen by registry
items.summary: Telegram's short domain t.me has been frozen by the registry, affecting short link services.

items.title: DeepMind CEO 呼吁美国主导成立全球 AI 监管机构
items.title_zh: DeepMind CEO 呼吁美国主导全球AI监管机构
items.title_en: DeepMind CEO Urges US-led Global AI Watchdog
items.summary: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis calls for a US-led global AI watchdog to assess frontier models before deployment.

items.title: 🤖 DeepSeek 完成首轮融资仅一月，再启新一轮估值 710 亿美元  中国 AI 创业公司 DeepSeek 在完成首轮融资约一个月后，已开始与投资者初步
items.title_zh: 🤖 DeepSeek 完成首轮融资仅一月，再启新一轮估值 710 亿美元
items.summary: DeepSeek, a Chinese AI startup, is seeking a $71B valuation in a new funding round just one month after its first round, and is developing its own AI chip.
